executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The API wraps all responses in {success: true, data: {...}}. So for POST /api/v1/documents, the response body is: {"success":true,"data":{"id":"...","title":"...","category":null,"status":"processing","fileSize":123,"mimeType":"text/plain","storageKey":"...","tags":[],"createdAt":"...","updatedAt":"..."}}. The 'id' field is inside 'data', not at top level. Assert on response.json()["data"]["id"]. Expected status code is 201.
